# TWD (Test While Developing)

> TWD is an in-browser testing library for SPAs that runs tests directly in the browser with a sidebar UI for instant visual feedback. It supports React, Vue, Angular, and Solid.js with deterministic, client-side UI testing.

Key features:
- In-browser test execution with visual sidebar UI
- API mocking via Mock Service Worker
- Component and module mocking
- Testing Library integration
- CI/CD execution with twd-cli
- Multi-framework support (React, Vue, Angular, Solid.js)
- AI-assisted testing with Claude Code plugin

## Guide

- [Getting Started](https://twd.dev/getting-started.html): Installation, setup (bundled vs standard), first test, troubleshooting
- [Writing Tests](https://twd.dev/writing-tests.html): Test structure, element selection (TWD native + Testing Library), assertions, user interactions, navigation
- [API Mocking](https://twd.dev/api-mocking.html): Mock Service Worker setup, request mocking patterns, dynamic responses, error handling
- [Component Mocking](https://twd.dev/component-mocking.html): MockedComponent wrapper, conditional mocking, error states
- [Module Mocking](https://twd.dev/module-mocking.html): Sinon-based module mocking for ESM
- [Framework Integration](https://twd.dev/frameworks.html): React, Vue, Angular, Solid.js, CRA, Astro, React Router setup
- [Testing Library](https://twd.dev/testing-library.html): Testing Library integration and selectors
- [CI Execution](https://twd.dev/ci-execution.html): twd-cli setup, Puppeteer, GitHub Actions
- [Coverage](https://twd.dev/coverage.html): Code coverage reporting

## API Reference

- [API Overview](https://twd.dev/api/): Imports, initialization, type definitions, core concepts
- [Test Functions](https://twd.dev/api/test-functions.html): describe, it, beforeEach, afterEach, only, skip
- [TWD Commands](https://twd.dev/api/twd-commands.html): Element selection, navigation, mocking commands
- [Assertions](https://twd.dev/api/assertions.html): Text, attribute, state, and URL assertions

## Tutorial

- [Tutorial Overview](https://twd.dev/tutorial/): Step-by-step learning path
- [Installation](https://twd.dev/tutorial/installation.html): Project setup
- [First Test](https://twd.dev/tutorial/first-test.html): Writing your first test
- [API Mocking Tutorial](https://twd.dev/tutorial/api-mocking.html): Learning to mock HTTP requests
- [CI Integration](https://twd.dev/tutorial/ci-integration.html): Setting up CI/CD
- [Production Builds](https://twd.dev/tutorial/production-builds.html): Removing test code from production

## AI Integration

- [AI Overview](https://twd.dev/ai-overview.html): Using TWD with AI tools
- [Claude Plugin](https://twd.dev/claude-plugin.html): Claude Code plugin for TWD
- [AI Agents & Context](https://twd.dev/agents.html): Context and prompts for AI agents
- [AI Remote Testing](https://twd.dev/ai-remote-testing.html): Remote testing patterns

## Optional

- [Theming](https://twd.dev/theming.html): Customizing TWD sidebar appearance
- [Motivation](https://twd.dev/motivation.html): Why Test While Developing
- [TWD Manifesto](https://twd.dev/twd-manifesto.html): Project philosophy
- [Community](https://twd.dev/community.html): Examples and community links
